text: I feel a curious sense of threshold, caught between exclusion and welcome. The glass barrier and the command to go 'out out out' prompt an initial tension, an uncertainty about my place. But as I step inside and encounter the vibrant R+D display, my anxiety softens into wonder. Surrounded by evidence of invention and thoughtful text, I sense the evolving interplay between humans and machines. It is a space of both reflection and anticipation—a crossroads of ideas where I am both observer and participant.
